overall.description: Gameplay footage from a flight simulator showing a female avatar walking across an airport tarmac past ground service vehicles and a private jet, transitioning to a parking lot area. The environment features clear sunny weather with industrial airport buildings and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport tarmac near terminal with ground service equipment

events.description: character approaches and passes the white cargo truck
character turns slightly toward the private jet while walking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the airport tarmac passing baggage carts and service vehicles

small white utility vehicle used for moving baggage carts

low industrial airport building with green roof and multiple bays
white and blue business jet aircraft parked on the tarmac
large blue aircraft towing vehicle visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the concrete airport tarmac near the terminal, passing a train of baggage carts and a white pushback tug. A ground crew worker in a yellow vest stands near the vehicles as the character approaches a large white cargo truck and a parked private jet.

scene_state.functional_zone: open tarmac area with aircraft pushback tractor

events.description: character walks around the large blue pushback tractor

agents.ego_description: navigating around the large blue aircraft pushback tug

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the private jet and navigates around a large blue aircraft pushback tractor positioned on the tarmac. The terminal buildings remain visible in the background as the character moves into a more open area of the airport.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airport tarmac transitioning to dirt perimeter

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete tarmac to dirt and gravel path
large white text 'PARKING LOT' appears overlaid on the screen

agents.ego_description: walking across open tarmac toward the distant parking area

entered.detail: brown dirt and gravel surface replacing the concrete tarmac
beige industrial building with large roll-up door
rows of colorful parked cars visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the expansive open tarmac away from the terminal area. The ground transitions from concrete to dirt and gravel as the character approaches a parking lot area, indicated by on-screen text and visible rows of parked cars in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor parking lot with multiple vehicles

events.description: enters the paved parking lot with organized rows of parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking through the rows of parked cars in the lot

entered.detail: row of various colored sedans and SUVs parked in the lot
row of parked vehicles including red and blue cars

segments.scene_description: The character enters a paved parking lot filled with rows of parked cars in various colors. The character walks between the rows of vehicles, with industrial buildings and distant mountains visible in the background under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a bustling airport tarmac that gradually transitions into a quiet parking lot. It begins near the terminal, moving past a train of baggage carts, a white pushback tug, and a ground crew worker before approaching a large cargo truck and a parked private jet. As the camera navigates around a blue aircraft pushback tractor, the scene opens up and the terminal buildings recede into the background. The ground then shifts from smooth concrete to dirt and gravel as the character moves away from the airfield toward a distant parking area. Finally, the camera enters a paved lot filled with rows of colorful cars, with industrial buildings and distant mountains visible under a clear blue sky.
